situation: User asked to compare Spanish vs English Covalto term sheet. Agent searched Drive first and found an old March 17 draft, producing a misleading analysis flagging major discrepancies. The actual final documents were email attachments sent same day by Pablo Demederos.
lesson: When user says they just received something, check Gmail FIRST before Drive. Drive may have older drafts that are not the current version. Search email with sender name + subject keywords to find the latest attachment.
